DriftGuardConfigSchema.signature:
z.object({
  contracts: ContractsConfig.optional(),
  sdk: SdkConfig.optional(),
  docs: DocsConfig.optional(),
  demos: DemosConfig.prefault({}),
  severity: SeverityRules.prefault({}),
  snapshot: SnapshotConfig.prefault({}),
  report: ReportConfig.prefault({}),
}).strict().refine(
  (c) => c.contracts || c.sdk || c.docs,
  { message: 'At least one of `contracts`, `sdk`, or `docs` must be configured.' },
)

RULES.signature: Record<RuleId, { description: string; configKey: keyof SeverityRules }>

SnapshotSchema.signature:
z.object({
  version: z.literal(SNAPSHOT_VERSION),
  createdAt: z.iso.datetime(),
  driftguardVersion: z.string(),
  contracts: z.record(z.string(), ContractSnapshotSchema).optional(),
  sdk: SdkSnapshotSchema.optional(),
  docs: z.array(DocFileSnapshotSchema).optional(),
}).strict()

analyzeDocs.signature: (config: DocsConfig, context: DocsAnalysisContext, cwd?: string): Promise<DocFileSnapshot[]>

buildReport.signature: (baseline: Snapshot, head: Snapshot, config: DriftGuardConfig): Report

diffContracts.signature: (baseline: Record<string, ContractSnapshot>, head: Record<string, ContractSnapshot>): ContractChange[]
